name: Potato Cheese Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up the potatoes.
2. Beat the egg in a blender until frothy.
3. Add potato pieces gradually, beating at medium speed until blended.
4. Stir in cheese, salt, and Ac'ent seasoning.
5. Shape as desired.
6. Dip into crumbs, then milk, and again into crumbs.
7. Fry in shallow hot fat until golden brown on all sides.
